raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Anderson Dam Seismic Retrofit Project is urgently needed to safeguard neighboring residents and businesses from potential flooding in the event of a major earthquake.",
    "Experts estimate that a magnitude 7.25 earthquake on the Calaveras Fault could significantly damage the Anderson Dam and lead to dam failure.",
    "Experts estimate that a magnitude 6.6 earthquake on the Coyote Creek Fault could significantly damage the Anderson Dam and lead to dam failure.",
    "The Anderson Dam was built in 1950 to the safety standards of that time.",
    "Valley Water prioritizes the Anderson Dam Seismic Retrofit Project for public safety and local water supply amid a historic drought."
  ]
}
```
